top_signals.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Call for Crop Sales to Iran Met With Skepticism by Traders
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump’s call for Iran to buy US crops as part of a peace deal is being met with a mix of doubt and cautious optimism by the American farm sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FedEx Projects Profit Growth This Year
top_signals.summary: FedEx earnings for the fiscal fourth quarter topped Wall Street estimates and the courier is projecting that profit will grow this year. The results suggest cost-cutting efforts are working. Peter McNally of Third Bridge breaks down the earnings on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Pemex Wants Petrobras' Deepwater Magic
top_signals.summary: When you're drowning in debt, plagued by declining production, and running a refining business that seems chronically allergic to profits, buddying up with a more successful partner starts looking like a sound strategy. That's essentially what just happened between Mexico's Pemex and Brazil's Petrobras. The two state-controlled oil giants signed a memorandum of understanding this week to collaborate on exploration, production, refining, natural gas, petrochemicals, and more. But the headline item? Deepwater exploration in the Gulf of Mexico. Petrobras…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Global Selloff in Equity Markets | Closing Bell
top_signals.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump directing ‘government dollars and time’ to quantum security could be a boon for bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Millions of bitcoins with exposed public addresses may be at risk to quantum computers, Project Eleven previously said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cyber Firm Varonis Weighs Sale After Takeover Interest
top_signals.summary: Cybersecurity company Varonis Systems Inc. is exploring options including a potential sale after receiving takeover interest, according to people familiar with the matter.
